summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TA Engine trading terminal with data validation layer. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend loads successfully with all components functional, validation warnings properly displayed for mock data, chart shows real Coinbase data with execution overlays, and data consistency validation working within 20% threshold.
passed_tests: Backend: All 13 API endpoints passing (100% success rate)
Terminal state API /api/terminal/state/BTCUSDT returns complete validation data
Frontend: Trading terminal loads at /trading with all components
Decision block shows action (GO_FULL) and confidence (87%)
Execution levels visible on chart with Entry/Stop/Target overlays
Validation block shows warnings for mock data as expected
Chart displays real Coinbase data with current price
Data consistency: Entry price within 2.6% of market price (well within 20% threshold)
Microstructure data displayed with imbalance, spread, liquidity, state
Position, Portfolio, and Risk blocks functional
Refresh button and execute button working
